notes: Preset button numbers are sane starting points only. Use voice-comms-dcs-input --list and the dashboard PTT test before flight.

presets.label: Keyboard fallback
presets.notes: Uses Right Ctrl as global keyboard PTT. Joystick polling may be disabled.

presets.label: Thrustmaster HOTAS Warthog
presets.notes: Common first-trigger/weapon-release style mapping. Verify exact Windows button index in your device order.

presets.label: Thrustmaster T.16000M / TWCS
presets.notes: Good starter mapping for a reachable thumb button. Adjust if DCS already uses the same button.

presets.label: Winwing Orion / Super Taurus family
presets.notes: Device order varies heavily with SimAppPro. Verify with voice-comms-dcs-input --list.

presets.label: Logitech/Saitek X56
presets.notes: Recommended as a non-exclusive PTT button. Confirm index because X56 exposes stick/throttle separately.

presets.label: Logitech/Saitek X52
presets.notes: Starter preset for X52/X52 Pro. Adjust after testing.

presets.label: F-16 Viper panel / ICP style
presets.device_hint: F-16 ICP/UFC/DED panel or Viper HOTAS bundle
presets.notes: Use for dedicated comm/PTT panel buttons. Exact index depends on the vendor firmware.
